title: crinum × grandiflorum
intro: Crinum × grandiflorum, a hybrid of the Crinum plant, is a species of flowering plant commonly known as the 'Nageli's Lily'. This plant is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Crinum × grandiflorum include its ability to relieve congestion, reduce fever, and soothe coughs, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its extracts can also be found in various herbal products, such as capsules and essential oils.
